allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "kubectl exec postgres-0 -n catest -- ps aux")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "kubectl delete statefulset postgres -n catest --wait; kubectl delete pvc pgdata-postgres-0 -n catest")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "kubectl exec postgres-0 -n catest -- psql -U catest -d postgres -c ''\\l''")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "kubectl exec postgres-0 -n catest -- psql -U catest -d catest_ingestion -c ''\\dt''")
